## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance tracking, and new vertical exploration.](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance: Early stages show normal progress; expecting significant uptick around month 3](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [New retail vertical: Exploring traditional retail and e-commerce as separate sub-sections](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Blog imagery: Moving towards a cleaner, simpler design with optional product images](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [AI-focused content: Planning new pages highlighting Siit's AI capabilities and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Tracking

  - [4 weeks since first publish; impressions growing steadily](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Clicks fluctuating, but expected to stabilize around week 4](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Significant uptick typically occurs around month 3 (100-200+ clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Current data scarcity limits detailed query/page analysis](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Will examine impression-generating queries and pages in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)

### Content Production and Imagery

  - [Several articles ready for publication by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [New blog design:](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Cleaner look with colored squares for post previews](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Two article layout options: with and without images](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [Product images to be used selectively (e.g., integration showcases)](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Temporary solution for this week's posts: color block backgrounds with titles](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Web developer to implement new design early next week](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### New Retail Vertical

  - [Sales team testing new sequence for traditional retail vertical](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [First demo secured with Zimmerman (large retail brand)](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Potential to split focus:](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
    1.  Traditional retail with both physical and online presence
    2.  E-commerce only brands
  - [Luxury brands (e.g., LVMH group) identified as potential targets](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [French website retention considered due to luxury brand connections](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Halo ITSM gaining visibility; team to investigate potential strategy changes](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Suggested tools for analysis:](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [SEMrush for ranking changes](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [Wayback Machine (web.archive.org) for historical site comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Customer Stories and Content Planning

  - [New customer stories received:](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [FinTech: Spenddesk, Conto](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [E-commerce: Gorgeous (for future e-commerce content)](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [More customer stories from various verticals pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### AI-Focused Content Strategy

  - [Rewriting navigation bar to highlight core use cases](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Planning dedicated page for AI capabilities (similar to Freshdesk's approach)](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Jess to conduct keyword research based on Carmel's draft](https://fathom.video/share/S4PzMksBFt8he5i9o9Jxp7W9Eg-sf4sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
